literal_meaning: underlying tendency toward passion for becoming
preferred_translation: underlying tendency toward passion for becoming
definition: A named latent tendency in the anusaya family.
notes: This compound should inherit the anusaya headword policy. Keep the latent force explicit and distinguish the compound from the outflow and fetter families.

example_phrases.notes: Named member of the latent-tendency family.
